commands: dnf install -y docker git jq awscli

if ! docker compose version >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -L https://github.com/docker/compose/releases/download/v2.29.2/docker-compose-linux-x86_64 -o /usr/local/bin/docker-compose && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/docker-compose; fi

cat > .env <<EOF
DB_HOST=$RDS_HOST
DB_PORT=3306
DB_PASSWORD=$DB_PASSWORD
DB_ROOT_PASSWORD=$DB_ROOT_PASSWORD
REDIS_CACHE=$REDIS_CACHE_HOST:6379
REDIS_QUEUE=$REDIS_QUEUE_HOST:6379
REDIS_SOCKETIO=$REDIS_QUEUE_HOST:6379
ERPNEXT_VERSION=$ERP_VERSION
ADMIN_PASSWORD=$ADMIN_PASSWORD
BACKUP_S3_BUCKET=$S3_BUCKET
EOF

cat > compose.public.yml <<EOF
services:
  frontend:
    ports:
      - "80:8080"
EOF
if [ -f pwd.yml ]; then COMPOSE_FILE=pwd.yml; elif [ -f compose.yaml ]; then COMPOSE_FILE=compose.yaml; else COMPOSE_FILE=docker-compose.yml; fi
if docker compose version >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker compose -f "$COMPOSE_FILE" -f compose.public.yml up -d; else /usr/local/bin/docker-compose -f "$COMPOSE_FILE" -f compose.public.yml up -d; fi
